settings.heading: Retirement Gift Mementos & Awards — Personalised Keepsakes
settings.subheading: Honour a long career with a meaningful, personalised memento — engraved crystal, wooden plaques, photo keepsakes and service awards. Thoughtfully designed, individually engraved, delivered across India.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices. Add presentation boxes, photos and longer citations as needed.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: A great retirement memento is personalised — engraved with the person's name, years of service, designation and a line of thanks. Popular choices are engraved crystal awards, wooden plaques and photo keepsakes, typically ₹350–₹5,000. Meru Trophy designs and delivers these across India, single pieces or full department sets. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: A keepsake that honours the years
settings.text: Retirement marks decades of contribution — the memento should feel personal, not generic. The most-loved pieces carry the retiree's name, years of service ("32 years of service"), designation, and a warm citation from the team, often with the company logo and a photo. Wood feels warm and timeless; crystal feels premium and ceremonial. We help you pick the right tone and engrave every detail so it becomes a desk or mantelpiece keepsake for life.

settings.title: Engraved crystal awards
settings.text: Premium, ceremonial pieces for a felicitation on stage.

settings.title: Wooden plaques
settings.text: Warm, classic engraved wood — a perennial favourite for retirements.

settings.title: Photo mementos
settings.text: UV-printed photo + citation for a deeply personal keepsake.

settings.title: Service-years detailing
settings.text: Years of service, dates and designation engraved alongside the name.

settings.question: What should I engrave on a retirement memento?
settings.answer: Name, designation, years of service (e.g. "In recognition of 32 years of dedicated service"), the dates, your organisation's name/logo, and a short line of gratitude from the team.

settings.question: Wooden or crystal for a retirement gift?
settings.answer: Wood feels warm, personal and timeless; crystal feels premium and ceremonial for a formal felicitation. Both engrave beautifully — we can mock up either so you can choose.

settings.question: Can you add a photo to the memento?
settings.answer: Yes — we UV-print photos onto crystal, acrylic and wood, combined with an engraved message and name. Send a high-resolution photo for the best result.

settings.question: Can you make several for a group of retirees?
settings.answer: Absolutely. We produce co-ordinated sets with each piece individually engraved, with volume pricing and a single GST invoice for HR teams.

settings.heading: Honouring someone's retirement?
settings.text: Share their name, years of service and the occasion — we'll design a personalised memento and quote.
